rulings.Case Title: JAMES TRUITT JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MAY 31, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, DEFENDANT NACCO MATERIALS HANDLING GROUP, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant NACCO Materials Handling Group, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication are denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Truitt was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Because defendant did not submit the special interrogatories it propounded on plaintiffs as part of its motion papers, the court is unable to determine what questions plaintiffs were responding to and and thus whether plaintiffs¿ responses are ¿factually devoid¿ as that term is used in Andrews, Union Bank and other summary judgment appellate decisions.. Further, Mr. Truitt¿s deposition testimony precludes defendant from sustaining its burden that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to Hyster-supplied (OEM) replacement vehicle parts. Defendant¿s separate statements did not make an issue of whether those parts contained asbestos, and whether such exposure was a substantial factor. Defendant did not sustain its burden of production that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence supporting their claim for false representation and request for punitive damages. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BLANCA FIGUEROA et al VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 31, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Brayton Purcell¿s motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs BLANCA FIGUEROA, JOHN FIGUEROA, JANET SIZAR, DAVID FIGUEROA, PAUL FIGUEROA, GARY FIGUEROA, ALEXIS JAMES is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless Brayton Purcell notifies plaintiffs of this tentative ruling and plaintiffs state that they do not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS KIRK VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSCECUTE
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MAY 31, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 4, DEFENDANT SEQUOIA VENTURES INC. MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSCECUTE. Defendant Sequoia Ventures Inc.¿s motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendant notifies Mr. Kirk of this tentative ruling and he states that he does not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)
